name: Stronger (Reprint)
effect_text: [Activate: Main] You may trash 1 card from your hand and trash this Character: If your Leader has the "Blackbeard Pirates" type, draw 1 card. Then, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters –2 cost during this turn.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.
